We have a 100-day returns policy: you have 100 days after receiving your item to request a return for any reason, even if you’ve used the product. If your return is accepted, your refund is processed and automatically applied to your original payment method within 5 business days. Shipping costs are non-refundable (and if your order qualified for free shipping, the shipping cost will be deducted from your refund).

Message from Aura: Returns are usually free, but in some countries an initial shipping fee may be deducted (you’ll see this in the return summary when you start the return). Also, shipping costs are non-refundable—if your order had free shipping, that shipping cost may be deducted from your refund.

Message from Aura: Some items can’t be returned—returns may be rejected if it’s outside the 100-day window, not shipped back, or if it’s a customized/bespoke product. If you tell me where you bought it (Loop website, Amazon, or a festival/retailer) and what item it is, I can confirm eligibility.
